REGISTER: cycle
NUMBER: 0xc00
MODE: U-mode
WIDTH: 64
FIELDS: 63..0=COUNT
EXTENSIONS: -

REGISTER: cycleh
NUMBER: 0xc80
MODE: U-mode
WIDTH: 32
FIELDS: 31..0=COUNT
EXTENSIONS: -

REGISTER: dcsr
NUMBER: 0x7b0
MODE: D-mode
WIDTH: 32
FIELDS: 31..28=DEBUGVER, 26..24=EXTCAUSE, 19..19=CETRIG, 18..18=PELP, 17..17=EBREAKVS, 16..16=EBREAKVU, 15..15=EBREAKM, 13..13=EBREAKS, 12..12=EBREAKU, 11..11=STEPIE, 10..10=STOPCOUNT, 9..9=STOPTIME, 8..6=CAUSE, 5..5=V, 4..4=MPRVEN, 3..3=NMIP, 2..2=STEP, 1..0=PRV
EXTENSIONS: -
